usefulness_evaluation.narrative: All 7 booking artifacts were ingested successfully with correct type classification, providers, and confirmation codes parsed. ExtractBookingField performed flawlessly across all 7 extractions, correctly identifying specific terminal/time from flights, cancellation terms from hotels, meeting points from activities, insurance/fuel from car rentals, disambiguating Hanoi check-in from multi-hostel bookings, extracting meal plans from ryokans, and counting tastings/dietary options from tours. The negative test (asking about hotel wifi on a flight booking) was correctly handled with no hallucination.
